title: Unique Vanilla
description:
📋 About
Unique Vanilla is a resourcepack that adds better vanilla textures, connected textures
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4031b2ffb78809f266a02d574488e1ef1ba2c0d7.png)

**Before reporting any issue, make sure you have Optifine installed.**

📋 **About**

Unique Vanilla is a resourcepack that adds better vanilla textures, connected textures and custom items.

⚙️ **Compatibility**

You need Optifine to get the full experience of this pack.
Alternatively, if you are using Fabric, you can use Continuity and CIT Resewn.


❓ **How to use**

Copy the pack into your resource packs folder or Drag and Drop it in the Resource pack Selection.
    Select the pack.
